summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Dashboard overhaul. All 13 data-testid elements verified. All 5 navigation flows tested. Mobile responsive layout (390px) verified. All 3 API endpoints working correctly. Fonts (Fraunces/Manrope) loading properly. Design elements (green gradient hero card, bento stats grid, progress pills) all rendering correctly.
passed_tests: Dashboard container found with data-testid='dashboard'
Welcome section found with data-testid='welcome-section'
Time-based greeting (Good morning/afternoon/evening) displays correctly
User's first name 'Shakira' displayed in welcome section
Lesson hero card found with data-testid='lesson-hero-card'
Lesson title 'Faith and Grace' displayed in hero card
Lesson description displayed in hero card
Lesson date (Mon, Feb 16, 2026) displayed in hero card
Progress pills (5 segments) visible with 1 of 5 completed
Continue CTA button displayed in hero card
Day Streak stat card found with data-testid='stat-streak' (tall card)
Lessons Done stat card found with data-testid='stat-lessons'
Enrolled stat card found with data-testid='stat-enrolled'
Quick Courses card found with data-testid='quick-courses'
Quick Chat card found with data-testid='quick-chat'
Quick Progress card found with data-testid='quick-progress'
Recent Chat section found with data-testid='recent-chat'
Chat messages show avatar, name, time, and content
Completion celebration NOT visible (correct - only 1 of 5 steps done)
Lesson hero card click navigates to /lessons/{id}
Quick Courses click navigates to /courses
Quick Chat click navigates to /chat
Quick Progress click navigates to /progress
View All link navigates to /chat
Mobile responsive: Dashboard visible at 390px viewport
Mobile responsive: Welcome section visible
Mobile responsive: Lesson hero card visible and clickable
Mobile responsive: Stats bento grid in 2-column layout
Mobile responsive: Quick Actions visible
Mobile responsive: Recent Chat visible
API: /api/lessons/next/upcoming returns lesson data
API: /api/my-progress returns progress data with streak_days, total_lessons_completed, total_courses_enrolled
API: /api/chat?limit=5 returns recent messages
Fraunces font loaded for headings
Manrope font loaded for body text
Lesson hero card has green gradient background
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard correctly fetches data from 3 parallel API calls (lessonsAPI.getNext, progressAPI.getMyProgress, chatAPI.getMessages)
Error handling implemented with .catch() for all API calls
Time-based greeting logic correctly uses hour of day
Progress pills correctly show completion state (filled vs unfilled)
CTA text dynamically changes: Begin (0 steps), Continue (1-4 steps), Review (5 steps)
Empty state handled with 'No Lesson This Week' card and Browse Courses button
Completion celebration only shows when all 5 steps complete
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard overhaul fully tested. Key data-testid values: dashboard, welcome-section, lesson-hero-card, stat-streak, stat-lessons, stat-enrolled, quick-courses, quick-chat, quick-progress, recent-chat, completion-celebration. The admin user (kirah092804@gmail.com) has no group_ids (global admin) but can still see lessons. Progress shows 0 enrolled courses, 0 lessons done, 0 day streak. Lesson 'Faith and Grace' shows 1 of 5 steps completed. Fonts: Fraunces (serif) for headings, Manrope (sans-serif) for body.

welcome_section.user_name: First name extracted from full name

stats_bento_grid.layout: 2-column grid with streak as tall card (row-span-2)

completion_celebration.condition: Shows only when completionCount === 5 && lesson exists
